# neon_project_access (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a project access permission.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_project_access" "example" {
  project_id    = "your-project-id"
  permission_id = "your-permission-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `permission_id` (String) The permission ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `granted_at` (String) The timestamp when the permission was granted.
- `granted_to_email` (String) The email address the project access was granted to.
